title: Thoughtly Call
description: Schema for a Thoughtly Call (a response produced by an Agent). Captures the metadata, outcome, structured transcript, and any custom data attached during the conversation.

interview_id.description: ID of the Agent that handled the call.

contact_id.description: ID of the Contact that was called or initiated the call.

job_id.description: ID of the bulk-call or automation job that scheduled this call.

status.description: Final status of the call (e.g. success, failure, voicemail).

outcome.description: Classified outcome from the Agent (e.g. booked, qualified, DNQ, voicemail).

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the call in seconds.

recording_url.description: URL to the call recording, when available.

transcript.description: Structured transcript array, with one entry per turn.

node_id.description: Agent builder node ID (AI turns only).
